_provenance.note: Re-baselined for VIB-5430 (Curve epic VIB-5422 M2; passed 16->18, failed 3->1): the Curve fixture now scores under the bespoke `curve_lp` scorecard profile instead of the generic V3 `lp` profile. The two former tick cells become Curve-shaped cells -- LP1 (range exposure) -> CURVE1 (LP_OPEN books funded per-coin legs) and LP2 (in-range-time fraction) -> CURVE2 (LP_CLOSE books collected coin legs) -- so the structural inapplicability (a rangeless fungible StableSwap/CryptoSwap pool has no ticks) is converted from a false books-broken FAIL to an honest PASS on what Curve genuinely books. CURVE3 (fees measured OR explicitly unavailable-with-reason), CURVE4 (IL N/A->XFAIL on the single-sided deposit), CURVE5 (open->close decomposition, reuses the LP5 predicate), CURVE6 (LP-token balance over time, reuses the LP6 liquidity predicate). This is a SCORER re-baseline on the EXISTING frozen lp_curve fixture -- NO money-path read change, NO parser/leg-semantics change (merge-gate high-risk triggers a/b/c/d are not hit). G6 (native-gas-in-equity USD reconciliation) stays FAIL on a pre-existing wallet-side gap (M1-5, VIB-5427 cluster) -- NOT masked. L5_22 informational (excluded from gating). Gating: 18/21 PASS. Prior history retained: VIB-5420 (LP6 via live virtual_price), VIB-3587 (single-sided USDC deposit, typed PrimitiveMoneyLegs).
